item.description: ### Fixed - **The Live Activity now appears while agents are working — not only when one needs you.** Previously the lock-screen fleet card could only start from a "needs you" moment, so after anything removed it (iOS removes Live Activities every time the app updates, including TestFlight updates) your lock screen stayed dark until the next approval prompt — even with agents visibly working. Now, whenever agents are active and your phone has no card, Perch brings it back on its own. Swiping the card away is still respected: it stays gone for an hour (a real "needs you" can still bring it back sooner). Works with your current phone build; pair with TestFlight build 27 for the fastest after-update recovery.
